source_summary.shard_requested: cup_in_the_wild (no exact match under this root; closest available shard used)
source_summary.val_selection: get_umi_dataset(dataset_name='umi/cup_arrangement_0', dataset_type='umi', is_val=True, use_grasp_state_repr=False, use_eef_pose=False) with default seed=0, used_episode_ratio=0.99 -> UMISingleTrajDataset.split_unused_episodes(); first val episode = sorted(used_episode_indices)[0]

note: UMI raw validation tutorial slice: single episode (source episode_index=115 of umi/cup_arrangement_0.zarr), the first episode of the val split under get_umi_dataset(is_val=True) default seed=0/used_episode_ratio=0.99. Converted from zarr (camera0_rgb, robot0_eef_pos, robot0_eef_rot_axis_angle [axis-angle -> quat_wxyz], robot0_gripper_width) into LeRobot v3.0 single-episode chunk-000/file-000 layout, matching the observation.state.right_main_camera_trajectory_xyz_wxyz / observation.state.right_gripper_width_m / observation.image.right_main_camera_rgb schema used by cosmos_framework.data.vfm.action.datasets.umi_lerobot_dataset.UMILeRobotDataset (same schema as the sibling umi_lerobot_example/cup_in_the_wild asset).

observation.image.right_main_camera_rgb.method: raw camera0_rgb uint8 frames from zarr, encoded directly via imageio/ffmpeg (libx264, crf=18, preset=veryfast, yuv420p) -- no source video decode needed (zarr stores raw frames, not video).
